summary: Twelve military armored vehicles assessed, all showing NO DAMAGE and CONFIRMED operational status, moving in formation across a dusty, arid terrain. The full scene depicts a dynamic convoy of tanks kicking up significant dust as they traverse a dry, uneven field under clear skies. The consistent NO DAMAGE assessments across all targets indicate the formation is fully functional and combat-ready.
